CANADA'S S&P/TSX COMPOSITE INDEX RISES 0.7% TO HIT RECORD

news.summary: WOBURN, Massachusetts, May 15, 2025 - Biofrontera Inc. (Nasdaq: BFRI), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in photodynamic therapy (PDT), has recently obtained patent approval until December 2043 for the updated Ameluz ® nanoemulsion gel formula that excludes propylene glycol. This formulation was authorized for use in Ameluz ® by the US Food and Drug Administration in 2024. This patent ensures prolonged protection for Ameluz ® from generic competitors. Moreover, Biofrontera has completed patient enrollment for its Phase 2b clinical trial of Ameluz ® (aminolevulinic acid hydrochloride) for treating moderate to severe acne vulgaris.
news.headline: Biofrontera Inc. extends patent on Ameluz® until 2043 and completes Phase 2b trial for acne, with FDA approval in 2024.

news.summary: JPMorganChase is currently seeking submissions from U.S.-based non-profit organizations and technology companies with a social mission to address fraud and scams targeting individuals, particularly those with low-to moderate-incomes. The Call for Ideas invites innovative solutions to enhance awareness and adoption of protective measures, offering early warning signals, and preventing fraud. The focus is on protecting vulnerable populations, and interested parties can submit their proposals for consideration.
news.headline: JPMorganChase launches initiative to support fraud prevention for low-to-moderate income individuals. Seeking innovative solutions.
US House Speaker Johnson: We're still on the path to pass the Trump tax bill next week.
QATAR WEALTH FUND PLANS TO INVEST $500 BLN IN US OVER 10 YEARS

news.summary: Recent data shows a significant drop in spot Bitcoin ETF inflows by over 90%, falling from $3 billion to $228 million in just four weeks. Historical analysis reveals a correlation between ETF inflows and Bitcoin price movements, though recent trends suggest that price movements can occur independently of ETF activity. While a potential price correction is indicated by the drop in inflows, long-term whale buying activity suggests a continuation of the Bitcoin uptrend. Whales are observed to be accumulating BTC, indicating a bullish outlook despite short-term selling pressure. The market remains volatile, and caution is advised in making investment decisions concerning Bitcoin.
news.headline: Bitcoin ETF inflows drop over 90%, from $3B to $228M in 4 wks. Despite bearish trend, whale activity suggests uptrend continuation.
US House Speaker Johnson: We're very very close to a state and local tax deal.

news.summary: Leading companies such as Eli Lilly & Co., Marathon Petroleum, and Intel have teamed up with other top players in the pharmaceutical, energy, and manufacturing sectors to showcase their achievements in utilizing innovative technology, more efficient processes, and quick implementations. The event took place in Las Vegas on May 15, 2025, and was organized by Seeq, a renowned global provider of industrial analytics and artificial intelligence solutions.
news.headline: Industry leaders gather at Seeq Conneqt 2025 to discuss AI and enterprise monitoring. Eli Lilly & Co., Marathon Petroleum, and Intel participate.

news.summary: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, has commenced investigations into multiple companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties towards shareholders. The investigations target Foot Locker, Inc. (NYSE: FL) regarding its recent sale. The firm is scrutinizing the financial transactions and activities involving significant amounts of capital related to this sale. The scrutiny is focused on upholding transparency and protecting shareholders' interests.
news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating FL, TIC, NVEE for violations of securities laws on behalf of shareholders. #NYSE #investigation

news.summary: In an announcement made on May 15, 2025, Matthew Klapper has been appointed as co-chair of the Congressional Investigations Practice alongside Emily Loeb and Ashley Callen. Additionally, he will serve as a founding co-chair of the recently established Global Crisis Management and Strategic Risk Practice, joining Joanna Ludlam and Wade Thomson in this role. This development marks a significant growth in Jenner's team with more leadership and strategic positions being filled.
news.headline: Jenner & Block hires Matthew Klapper as co-chair of Congressional Investigations & Global Crisis Management, launching new practice.

news.summary: A prominent venture capital firm, Griffin Gaming Partners, located in Santa Monica, California, revealed its support for Super Banana Studios, a fresh gaming studio established by industry veterans Danil Moskovoy and Nikolay Ternovoy. Drawing from years of involvement with notable companies such as Zeptolab, Voodoo, Tripledot, Popcore, and Playrix, the founders are leveraging their extensive background to drive a new venture. This move signals the firm's strategic investment in the gaming sector and demonstrates their confidence in the expertise and potential of the Super Banana Studios team.
news.headline: Griffin Gaming supports Super Banana Studios, formed by gaming veterans, Danil Moskovoy and Nikolay Ternovoy.

news.summary: In Shanghai on May 15, 2025, Xiao-I Corporation, a prominent player in artificial intelligence solutions listed on NASDAQ under the ticker AIXI, revealed key audited financial outcomes for 2024. The company emphasized profitability through efficiency and discipline in its operations.
news.headline: Xiao-I Corporation's revenue rose by 19% in 2024, aiming for profitability in 2025. The company focuses on efficiency and discipline to achieve their goal.

news.summary: In 2025, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and gold have stopped moving in sync after rising together last year as hedges against currency depreciation. JPMorgan analysts, led by managing director Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou, observed that the two assets have entered a zero-sum phase. There has been a reversal in capital flows in recent months, with gold outperforming from mid-February to mid-April, while Bitcoin has lagged. However, since late April, the trend has changed, with Bitcoin seeing an 18% increase while gold has decreased by almost 8%. Investor flows and futures data back this divergence, showing capital moving out of gold ETFs and into Bitcoin funds. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin now outperforms gold in a zero-sum game; since late April, Bitcoin has gained 18% while gold has dropped 8%.

news.summary: A revolutionary award-winning technology has been introduced, winning two prestigious Golden Awards for their innovative designs. These designs include the "Privacy-Aware Intelligent Robotic Dog" and the "Edge AI Computing Sensor System." Additionally, the company has revealed more groundbreaking innovations such as the MemorAiLink Platform/Sub-System, specifically designed for Edge AI applications. Another notable creation is the USB Share 4K60 A/V Processor, which enables high-quality audio and video processing. These advancements showcase the company's commitment to developing cutting-edge and user-friendly technology for modern applications.
news.headline: Highlights from Computex 2025: Etron Tech wins two Golden Awards, unveils "Privacy-Aware Intelligent Robotic Dog" and "Edge AI Computing Sensor System", along with other innovations.

news.summary: The President of the United States claimed that New Delhi may not impose tariffs on the US. India's foreign minister stated that discussions between the two countries are ongoing.
news.headline: Trump criticizes India on trade talks and Apple manufacturing. Trump claims India will charge US zero tariff, while India's foreign minister says negotiations ongoing.

news.summary: Dan Loeb's Third Point portfolio showed changes in Q4 2024 earnings results across various sectors. The firm reduced its stake in Cinemark Holdings Inc from 7,000,000 shares to 3,750,000 shares during the same period. Cinemark reported a 32 cents EPS loss for the first quarter of 2024, contrary to the estimated 10 cents loss, with sales reaching $540.70 million (6.6% down from the previous year). Analyst David Karnovsky noted revenue of $515 million and $26 million in EBITDA, with increased attendance and per-patron spending driving the performance. D-Box technologies will expand its partnership with Cinemark by adding over 70 haptic-enabled screens to 25 theaters in the US within eighteen months. Cinemark's year-to-date drop was 2.13%, whereas the Invesco S&P SmallCap Utilities & Communication Services ETF declined by 5.73% during the same period. Third Point's positions in Corpay, Inc also experienced changes, as detailed in the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dan Loeb's Third Point firm reduced stake in Cinemark Holdings Inc from 7M to 3.75M shares in Q4 2024, despite EPS losses and sales down 6.6% YoY. D-Box technologies expanding ties with Cinemark with 70 screens in 18 months. Cinemark fell 2.13% YTD compared to Invesco ETF down 5.73%. Corpay, Inc. development also covered in article.

news.summary: A respected foundation, the Blavatnik Family Foundation, has been a consistent supporter of the innovative work of researcher Evgeny Nudler. Their ongoing contribution has exciting prospects for progress in cancer therapy, combating antibiotic resistance, and anti-aging solutions. In a recent development, NYU Langone Health disclosed a substantial $15 million donation from the foundation.
news.headline: NYU Langone Health receives $15M donation from Blavatnik Family Foundation to support biomedical breakthroughs in cancer therapy, antibiotic resistance, and anti-aging.

news.summary: KE Holdings Inc (NYSE: BEKE) reported impressive first-quarter FY25 results, with net revenues increasing by 42.4% Y/Y to 23.3 billion Chinese Yuan ($3.21 billion), surpassing the $3.09 billion consensus. Mobile monthly active users averaged 44.5 million, down from 47.7 million a year ago. Gross transaction value (GTV) hit 843.7 billion Chinese Yuan ($116.3 billion), up by 34.0% Y/Y, with existing home transactions growing by 28.1% to 580.3 billion Chinese Yuan ($80.0 billion) and new home transactions up by 53.0% to 232.2 billion Chinese Yuan ($32.0 billion). GTV for home renovation, furnishing, and rental services also saw significant increases. Gross profit rose by 17.0% Y/Y to 4.8 billion Chinese Yuan ($0.7 billion), but the gross margin decreased to 20.7% from 25.2%, partly due to lower net revenues and contribution margins from existing homes.
news.headline: BEKE's Q1 revenue up 42% to $3.21 billion Chinese Yuan, GTV hits $116.3 billion. Mobile MAU down, GTV for existing homes up 28.1%, new homes up 53%. Gross profit up 17% to $0.7 billion. Gross margin down to 20.7%. Read more on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC in New York has initiated an investigation into companies suspected of violating federal securities laws or breaching fiduciary duties towards shareholders. Among the companies under scrutiny is LENSAR, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNSR), which is being examined for its recent sale transaction. This investigation is significant as it aims to uphold transparency and accountability in the financial sector for the benefit of shareholders.
news.headline: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates LNSR, SSBK, RDUS for possible breaches, shares info on PRNewswire.

news.summary: A nonprofit health plan based in Oakland, California, with over 1.5 million members, has recently partnered with Cozeva to facilitate the secure integration of crucial health data from leading provider organizations. This collaboration aims to streamline care coordination processes for the members. As of May 15, 2025, Blue Shield of California has decided to enhance its Digital Health Record system.
news.headline: Blue Shield of California expands Digital Health Record for 1.5 million members to improve care quality and affordability.

news.summary: A major deal has been struck in Asbury Park, NJ as Solar Landscape, a top commercial rooftop solar developer, unveiled a significant partnership worth $175 million with PGIM Private Capital. This financing agreement is set to support the expansion of Solar Landscape's project portfolio, specifically focusing on feeding electricity into the distributed grid within Maryland and Illinois. PGIM Private Capital, which functions as the private capital division of PGIM—an investment management business with a global value of $1.4 trillion under Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE: PRU), is a key player in this collaboration.
news.headline: Solar Landscape secures $175M from PGIM Private Capital for rooftop solar projects across Maryland and Illinois.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 4.6% in the coming year. This growth is expected to be driven by a strong rebound in consumer spending, with a projected increase of 5.1%. Additionally, business investment is expected to rise by around 6.2%, reflecting increased confidence in the economic recovery. On the employment front, it is anticipated that approximately 20 million jobs will be created globally, reducing the unemployment rate to around 5.5%. Overall, the outlook for the global economy appears optimistic, with various sectors showing signs of improvement.
news.headline: DEWA PJSC joins MSCI Emerging Markets index, a significant move for the company.

news.summary: Publicly announced in San Francisco, the company reported a significant 25% increase in revenues. Alongside this growth, they introduced a new product called Airbyte Embedded and incorporated Azure as a data destination. The company also received accolades from Fast Company and CRN, showcasing their industry recognition and success.
news.headline: Airbyte reports 25% revenue growth in Q1, introduces new product and recognized by Fast Company and CRN.

news.summary: In San Francisco today, a new enterprise SaaS startup called SCIP (Supply Chain Intelligence Platform) has been publicly launched. This platform aims to assist companies in transitioning from reactive decision-making to proactive, data-driven choices in managing their supply chains. Despite not seeking significant funding or expanding their team extensively, SCIP has achieved over $1 million in annual recurring revenue solely with its founding members. This success demonstrates that SCIP's services are well-received within the electronics, medical device, and contract manufacturing industries.
news.headline: SCIP launches with $1M annual recurring revenue, helping companies optimize supply chains with data-driven decisions.

news.summary: Today, Landsvirkjun has effectively launched green bonds in the U.S. private placement market, raising a total of USD 150 million. Originally aiming for USD 125 million, the issuance was increased due to high investor demand, resulting in the final closure amount of USD 150 million.
news.headline: Landsvirkjun issues $150M green bonds in U.S. private placement market after strong investor interest, surpassing $125M target.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Scrypted Inc. announced the acquisition of Chibi Clash, a gaming ecosystem known for its popular titles Kingdoms and Survivor. This move will offer Scrypted access to key game engine and web3 technology assets for their Autonomous Virtual Beings (AVB) initiative. The acquisition is aimed at strengthening Scrypted's position in the gaming industry and is indicative of the company's focus on further developing its AVB offerings.
news.headline: Scrypted buys Chibi Clash for AI gaming; gains Kingdoms & Survivor; boosts AVB tech. Washington, May 15, 2025.

news.summary: A ribbon-cutting event will be held by a popular supermarket chain on June 4th in COLTON, Calif. The event marks the celebration of Vallarta Supermarkets, a prominent Latino-owned grocery chain in California, on 40 years of serving the community.
news.headline: Vallarta Supermarkets opens 60th store in Colton, California. Ribbon-cutting on June 4th. Leading Latino-owned grocery chain.

news.summary: A subsidiary of Phillips 66, listed as PSX on NYSE, has finalized a deal to sell 65% of its retail marketing business in Germany and Austria to a consortium owned by subsidiaries of Energy Equation Partners and Stonepeak. The agreement is set at an enterprise value of approximately €2.5 billion, which equals around $2.8 billion. The transaction is based on an Enterprise Value/EBITDA multiple of 9.1x, considering the anticipated 2025 EBITDA. Phillips 66 foresees receiving pre-tax cash proceeds of about €1.5 billion, equivalent to $1.6 billion, after standard purchase price adjustments have been made. Additional insights can be found in the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Phillips 66 sells 65% stake in European retail market for $2.8 billion to consortium, expects $1.6 billion in cash proceeds.
US 30-Year Freddie Mac Fixed Rate Mortgages 15-May Wk: 6.81% (prev 6.76%)

news.summary: In Washington on May 15, 2025, Team Velocity, a prominent marketing technology company catering to the automotive sector, introduced Vehicle Detail Videos (VDVs). This groundbreaking technology utilizes AI to automatically create engaging videos showcasing dealership inventory. The innovation aims to enhance the customer experience and drive sales.
news.headline: Team Velocity introduces VDV, AI-driven vehicle detail videos for dealerships, boosting conversions.

news.summary: In a press release from Palo Alto, California on May 15, 2025, Pangea, a prominent AI security guardrail provider, shared results from their recent study. The study, called the $10,000 Prompt Injection Challenge, took place in March 2025 on a global scale. Over 800 individuals from 85 countries took part in this initiative that spanned one month.
news.headline: Pangea report on GenAI vulnerabilities reveals insights from 300,000+ prompt injection attempts in $10,000 Global Challenge.

news.summary: Sony Electronics Inc. unveiled their latest wireless noise-canceling headphones, the WH-1000XM6, on May 15, 2025. These headphones were developed in collaboration with top mastering audio engineers, ensuring studio-quality precision sound. Boasting Sony's most advanced noise-canceling technology to date, the WH-1000XM6 offers unparalleled audio experience.
news.headline: Sony announces WH-1000XM6 headphones with advanced noise cancellation co-created by audio engineers.

news.summary: In a recent report by VerdictSearch and Law.com, it was announced that Midwest Energy Emissions Corp, represented by Caldwell Cassady & Curry from Dallas, secured a significant victory in a patent infringement case in 2024. The multimillion-dollar verdict stands out as one of the Top 100 Verdicts of the year. This achievement highlights the prowess of the legal team and underscores the importance of protecting intellectual property rights in the industry.
news.headline: Midwest Energy Emissions wins multimillion-dollar patent infringement case, ranked in top 100 verdicts of 2024.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, the AI Acceleration Cloud company Together AI revealed the acquisition of Refuel.ai, a company known for converting unstructured data into organized datasets for AI purposes. This acquisition bolsters Together AI's position in the market and enhances its capabilities in handling high-quality datasets for AI applications.
news.headline: Together AI acquires Refuel.ai to speed up AI app development. Acquisition strengthens Together AI's capabilities in transforming unstructured data.

news.summary: In Monterey, California, on May 15, 2025, the popular vintage fashion brand Retro Stage is marking its 8th year since establishment. Renowned for its commitment to merging nostalgic trends with contemporary tastes using impeccable artisanal techniques, Retro Stage is commemorating this milestone by...
news.headline: Vintage fashion brand Retro Stage celebrates 8th anniversary, known for blending nostalgic styles from 1920s to 1980s.

news.summary: Taking place on May 15, 2025, in Los Angeles, the 4th Annual California Turkish Festival organized by ATASC will be held on Sunday, June 1st. The festival is free for everyone to attend and will offer a variety of Turkish cuisine and beverages. There will be live entertainment throughout the day, as well as numerous activities designed for children. This event promises a day filled with delicious food, cultural experiences, and fun for attendees of all ages.
news.headline: 4th Annual California Turkish Festival on June 1st at Shoreline Aquatic Park in Long Beach. Free event with Turkish cuisine, live entertainment, and activities. LOS ANGELES, May 15, 2025 /PRNewswire.

news.summary: In Fremont, California on May 15, 2025, THINK Surgical, Inc. revealed that their TMINI® Miniature Robotic System had reached a milestone of being employed in 1,000 total knee (TKA) procedures. The significant 1,000th case was successfully conducted by Dr. [...] as part of the company's endeavors in orthopedic surgical robots.
news.headline: THINK Surgical's TMINI® Miniature Robotic System hits 1,000th total knee procedure milestone. #surgicalrobots #innovation

news.summary: Today, a prominent organization is launching a global campaign in New York to educate social-media users on spotting fake imagery. Columbia Journalism Review, a leading voice on press criticism and the future of news, is utilizing viral AI images to teach Americans the necessary skills. The campaign aims to reach a wide audience and improve awareness about the prevalence of fake imagery online.
news.headline: Columbia Journalism Review uses AI images to educate users on spotting fake imagery, launching global campaign.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Los Angeles, a leading vacation lifestyle brand Cupshe has announced a new collaboration with renowned fashion influencer and winner of The Bachelor Season 28, Kelsey Anderson. Anderson will be the brand's fresh ambassador, working on the exclusive Cupshe x Kelsey Anderson collection. This partnership showcases Cupshe's commitment to engaging with influencers, as they tap Anderson's following of over a million to expand their reach in the fashion market.
news.headline: Cupshe partners with The Bachelor winner Kelsey Anderson for a new swim and apparel collection.

news.summary: In recent times, the cost of car insurance is increasing, alongside other expenses. Drivers are eager to reduce their auto insurance premiums. Factors such as driving history, age, and vehicle type significantly impact insurance rates. Consumers are seeking strategies to mitigate these escalating costs.
news.headline: Mercury Insurance highlights key factors impacting car insurance rates: Driving record, age, vehicle type.

news.summary: Bubble has announced the launch of its inaugural campus scholarship program, granting over 20 scholarships to brand and college ambassadors. Participants have the opportunity to earn up to $10,000 through this initiative. Bubble is a community-driven brand focused on providing premium quality and effective skincare products. The program aims to support ambassadors and students who are passionate about skincare and beauty. The scholarships offer financial assistance and recognition for their dedication to the brand.
news.headline: Bubble launches first-ever campus scholarship program; offering 20+ scholarships; ambassadors can earn up to $10,000.

news.summary: Prepare for an out-of-this-world experience with Planet Party Time! Recently launched by NetEase Games in Hangzhou, China on May 15, 2025, this innovative social simulation and party game invites players to mingle with friends and create their very own planets. The game offers a unique opportunity for players to gather and enjoy shared experiences within a virtual galaxy. Don't miss out on this exciting adventure now available to play worldwide.
news.headline: NetEase Games launches new social simulation and party game, Planet Party Time, offering players a chance to build planets and party with friends.

news.summary: A recent partnership between Shaw-Ross International Importers and Smoke Wagon Bourbon aims to strengthen Shaw-Ross's position in the American whiskey market. The collaboration, announced on May 15, 2025, marks a significant move for Shaw-Ross as Smoke Wagon Bourbon is recognized as one of the fastest-growing brands in the category. This strategic alliance will allow Shaw-Ross to tap into the success of Smoke Wagon Bourbon and expand its reach in the market. The partnership signals a promising growth opportunity for both companies as they work together to capitalize on the increasing demand for premium American whiskey.
news.headline: Shaw-Ross International Importers partner with Smoke Wagon Bourbon to expand presence in American whiskey market.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Brunel International N.V. (BRNL) disclosed the outcomes of the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGM), where crucial decisions were made for the company's future. Brunel is a leading global provider of tailored project and workforce services aimed at fostering sustainable industry growth by leveraging technology and expertise.
news.headline: Brunel's AGM finalized with approval of all voting items in Amsterdam, BRNL; company specializes in project and workforce solutions.

news.summary: Solutions30, the leading provider of multi-technical services in Europe for telecommunications, energy, and IT industries, has appointed Antoine Mirabel as the new CEO of their operations in France. Mirabel takes over from Amaury Boilot, who held the position temporarily since June 2023 while also managing group-level duties. Additionally, Oliver Fidorra has been named Co-CEO of the company's operations in Germany, sharing the role with Luc Brusselaers, who holds the title of Chief Revenue Officer for the organization. Moreover, in Belgium, Axel Vandevenne has been appointed as Co-CEO to oversee and enhance local operations in collaboration with Raf Winnelinckx.
news.headline: Solutions30 appoints 3 new CEOs: Antoine Mirabel in France, Oliver Fidorra in Germany, and Axel Vandevenne in Belgium, assisting local operations.
vTv Therapeutics restarts screening for CATT1 Phase 3 trial testing liver-selective glucokinase activator Cadisegliatin for Type 1 Diabetes.
Worldline announces preparatory documents available for the Combined General Meeting on June 5, 2025. #Worldline #AGM #June5

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Freddie Mac unveiled the findings of its latest Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ). The report indicated that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stood at 6.81%.
news.headline: 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.81%, lower than 7%, per Freddie Mac survey on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: VALLOUREC, a French corporation, operates as a limited liability company (société anonyme) with a Board of Directors and a share capital of €4,767,162.72. The company is headquartered at 12 rue de la Verrerie, 92190 Meudon, France, and is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under number 552 142 200.
news.headline: Vallourec is a French company with a share capital of €4,767,162.72. Registered office in Meudon, France.
